Defines the TypeError thrower object and its properties for ECMAScript compliance.

# Purpose
This code is a C header file that defines macros and constants related to the `[[ThrowTypeError]]` function as described in the ECMA-262 specification, version 5. It includes macro definitions for `OBJECT_ID` and `NUMBER_VALUE`, which are used to specify an object identifier and a number property, respectively. The `OBJECT_ID` macro is used to define the identifier `ECMA_BUILTIN_ID_TYPE_ERROR_THROWER`, which likely corresponds to a built-in object in the ECMAScript environment. The `NUMBER_VALUE` macro defines a property with the name `LIT_MAGIC_STRING_LENGTH`, a value of `0`, and attributes specified as `ECMA_PROPERTY_FIXED`, indicating that the property is non-writable, non-enumerable, and non-configurable. The file concludes by undefining the macros to prevent their use outside this context.
